name: MVP
summary: Ready to build the first working version. Adds a spec convention (/spec + FEAT-NNN), a stack-configured build gate (/smoke), a devlog (/log), and a session-end ritual (/close + RESUME.md). Adds a tester + program-manager builder pair, and the mentors that matter when you start building: architect (stack/data/boundaries) and GTM (first 100 users).
graduationHint: When you have real users and the app needs design rigor, a real db, and prototypes — boss unlock v1.
